name: Sports Plex and Pizzeria Indoor Pickleball Complex
description: Come play pickleball at Sports Plex and Pizzeria Indoor Pickleball Complex in Shenandoah, IA! There are 2 indoor concrete, asphalt, and hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are private. The facility includes amenities like lights, food, restrooms, water, youth programming, and trainers or lessons. Reservations are not available.
